brief_notes: Thorough coverage of this complex molecular biology paper. Accurately reproduces key findings: ~50% reduction of high-MW SUMOylated proteins (>200 kDa) in EMA2 KO, Spt6 as major SUMOylation target, pMAC-lncRNA loss at M/L8/R2 boundaries, TDSD defects, and Spt6-C-KR mutant phenotypes. Methods section is exceptionally detailed with accurate buffer compositions, centrifugation speeds, and PCR conditions matching extraction. Three summary tables effectively organize phenotypic data. One minor hallucination in elaborating AlphaFold prediction details. Figures referenced but likely placeholders.
